title: Canopy Growth Revenue Analysis 2015-2025
text: Canopy Growth's historical revenue shows growth trajectory with recent transformations. The company has shown year-over-year revenue changes reflecting market conditions and strategic initiatives. Recent revenue trends show sequential growth in core cannabis businesses, with Canada Medical Cannabis driving growth. Full-year fiscal 2024 revenue was approximately $400+ million with adjusted EBITDA losses narrowing significantly. The revenue composition has shifted toward higher-margin products and markets, supporting the company's path to profitability.
